title: The Rope That Was Always Too Short
summary_seed: Mother Yasoda tries to bind Krishna, but Krishna is bound only by love

title: The Fruit Seller's Basket
summary_seed: Little Krishna gives grains and receives fruit; the fruit seller receives spiritual fortune

title: Gajendra Calls the Lord
summary_seed: Gajendra remembers the Supreme Lord and calls for help with surrender

title: Prahlada's Faith
summary_seed: Prahlada remains devoted to Krishna despite hardship
